transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said I need to see a rheumatologist, but I don't know how to get the referral started.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Grace Talbot, born March 4th, 1979.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Grace. I see Dr. Ellen Park referred you for joint pain evaluation on Tuesday. Let me check which specialists are in-network for your plan, the Coastal Advantage PPO.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that sounds right. Is there someone close to Riverdale?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, Dr. Samuel Oduya at Riverdale Joint Care is in-network and accepting new patients. I can send the referral request directly to his office.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done. The referral's been submitted, and their office should call within two business days to schedule. I'll also text you their number, 555-0148, in case you want to call sooner.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Grace. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Glad I could help. Take care, and feel better soon.
